vault.heading: Vault
vault.detectedObsidian: Obsidian vaults detected on this machine
vault.noObsidian: No Obsidian vaults detected. Install Obsidian or keep using the default Coxinha vault.
vault.saved: Saved. Click "Rebuild index" below to pick up files from the new vault.
vault.rebuildDescription: The SQLite index is a rebuildable view over the vault files. Use this if you edited notes outside Coxinha or just switched vaults.
